channel.title: ToolLab Updates
channel.description: Recent structural and content updates for ToolLab.

item.title: Added HTML tool sitemap
item.description: Added a browseable HTML sitemap that links every major tool page and support page.

item.title: Added FAQ page
item.description: Published a dedicated FAQ page covering tools, privacy, and search visibility.

item.title: Expanded support pages
item.description: Expanded support pages such as changelog, roadmap, about, and contact to avoid thin content.
